event: Pifferari (Italian Bagpipe Players) Before an Altar
description: A painting showing three figures in rural Italian costume. An elderly bearded man in a worn brown cloak and leather garments stands at left, holding a bagpipe or zampogna under his arm. Beside him, a younger man with long dark hair plays a small pipe or flute, his cheeks puffed with the effort. In front of them, a young woman in a white blouse and headscarf kneels with hands clasped in prayer, her eyes closed in devotion. They stand against a background of a tree trunk and rocky landscape.

_meta.title: Pifferari in front of an altar
